holeInOneEnabled.description: Enable hole-in-one (no deaths) ad-skip credit reward

adSkipCreditsPerReward.description: Number of ad-skip credits awarded per achievement

Level1Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 1

Level2Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 2

Level3Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 3

Level4Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 4

Level5Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 5

Level6Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 6

Level7Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 7

Level8Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 8

Level9Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 9

Level10Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 10

Level11Scene.description: Target time in seconds to beat for Level 11

runSpeed.description: Player run speed - when holding space bar

gravityY.description: Player gravity - higher for snappier feel

wallSlideSpeed.description: Speed when sliding down a wall

coyoteTime.description: Coyote time in ms - allows jump shortly after leaving platform

jumpBufferTime.description: Jump buffer time in ms - allows pre-press jump before landing

wallJumpGraceTime.description: Time in ms player can still wall jump after leaving wall

autoRicochetCooldown.description: Cooldown in ms between auto-ricochet wall jumps (turbo mode) - lower = faster bouncing

respawnDelay.description: Delay before respawn after death in ms

fragmentTypes.description: Number of different fragment types (drums, bass, guitar, vocals)
